metadata.issue: Emails prior to 2 March 2026 not showing in IMAP/Outlook. 31GB of mail data still on disk.
metadata.root_cause: Dovecot index corruption (Trash and Drafts folders had invalid UID entries in dovecot.index)
steps_taken: 1. Identified cPanel account: nts231 on srv80
2. Checked maildir size: 31GB total (alvin 2.5GB, ernest 21GB, admin 7.6GB) — emails physically present
3. Ran doveadm force-resync and doveadm index on all three accounts (alvin, ernest, admin)
4. Dovecot reported: "Log synchronization error at seq=4,offset=236 - Extension record update for invalid uid=1"
5. Dovecot auto-fscked and repaired Trash and Drafts index files
6. Verified repair: alvin=6544 msgs, ernest=64788 msgs, admin=10576 msgs — all intact
metadata.result: Index corruption repaired. All emails restored and visible.
metadata.recommendation: Client to verify from webmail (Roundcube) and confirm if history/archived folders also need resync
